reason: The unexpanded pilot-extrema envelope did not reproduce. Four runs exceeded the frozen median-rate and burst-fraction limits; two also exceeded the p99 single-cadence residual limit.
scientific_disposition: Retain every artifact. Do not promote candidate v1, do not retune v1 from confirmation data, and do not reuse these runs as confirmation for another contract.
next_contract_derivation: Candidate v2 uses only the five original Pilot v3 diagnostics with a predeclared Bonferroni-familywise prediction method. Confirmation v3 values are excluded from its calculations.
